description: The contract has no CRIT vs NON-CRIT split. All five criteria are labeled CRIT-001..005 with no indication of which are blocking and which are advisory. The user's review checklist explicitly required 'CRIT (critical) と NON-CRIT の区別があるか'. Combined with the pre-stamped 'status: PASS' on every criterion (lines 27, 35, 43, 51, 59) and an 'evidence' field that lists final test artifacts, this contract reads as a post-hoc verdict rather than a binding pre-implementation contract. A negotiationRound: 0 contract should not embed evidence pointing at green-phase.txt or specific test cases that did not exist when the contract was first negotiated.

evidence.snippet: negotiationRound: 0 ... status: approved ... status: PASS ... evidence: green-phase.txt — 1650/1650 bun pass
